blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
